Within the division Magnoliophyta, Dortmanna phyllostachya belongs to the class Magnoliopsida, a group of flowering plants that have two cotyledons. The health benefits of Phyllostachys include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
